originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Refactoring Isaac Gym Wrapper and Debugging Rendering for PufferLib
summary: Worked on stripping down the Isaac Gym environment code from over 2000 lines to around 1000 lines, removing redundant PhD-student-written wrappers. Debugged a segfault in the rendering loop and integrated the cleaned environment with PufferLib for high-performance reinforcement learning.
